summary: Bug Fix Verified - Risk Limits tab now shows actual trade data from demo accounts. The fix in get_deals_for_account() method successfully queries both mt5_deals and mt5_deals_history collections.

integration_issues.issue: TOTAL TRADES KPI still shows 0 in Portfolio Overview tab - this is a separate issue in the managers endpoint aggregation, not related to this fix

action_items: OPTIONAL: Investigate why TOTAL TRADES KPI in Portfolio Overview shows 0 (separate issue from this fix)
critical_code_review_comments: Fix correctly implemented: get_deals_for_account() now checks both mt5_deals and mt5_deals_history collections
Trading deals properly filtered (excluding deposits/withdrawals with symbol check)
Risk scores calculated correctly based on actual trading data

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Risk Limits tab displays correct data

context_for_next_testing_agent: Risk Limits fix verified. Demo accounts now show actual trade data in Risk Limits tab. Portfolio Overview KPI for TOTAL TRADES may still show 0 - this is a separate issue in the managers endpoint aggregation.

ui_tests.risk_scores_vary: PASS - Different strategies show different scores (40, 70, 72, 100)

bug_fix_verification.issue: Risk Limits tab was showing 0 trades analyzed and 100% compliance for all strategies
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Demo account deals stored in mt5_deals_history collection, not mt5_deals
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Updated get_deals_for_account() method to query both collections
